---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Motivation
Please explain the motivation for this feature. What problem does it solve? Why is it important?

## 📋 Use Cases
Describe specific use cases for this feature:
1. Use case 1
2. Use case 2
3. Use case 3

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see in detail. Include:
- How it would work
- User interface changes (if any)
- API changes (if any)
- Configuration changes (if any)

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. What are the pros and cons of each?

## 📊 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## 🔧 Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, please share them:
- Technical approach
- Files that would need to be modified
- Potential challenges
- Dependencies required

## 📈 Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Must have
- [ ] High - Important
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute
- [ ] I'd be willing to help implement this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I can provide feedback during development

## 📝 Additional Information
Add any other information about the feature request here.
